title: v0.5.10-alpha — NPC Rendering, Damage & Trainers
body: NPCs now render correctly when switching between maps. Player and NPC combat damage is fully live — equip a weapon and attack from your hotbar. Ability trainers now open the skill shop when you interact. Launcher login button now shows correctly before you sign in.

title: v0.5.8-alpha — Launcher Login & Char Creation
body: Log in once from the launcher and stay logged in. Character creation now refreshes the selection screen instantly. Quit-to-menu no longer leaves the HUD on screen.

title: v0.5.0-alpha — First Multiplayer Test
body: Directional melee combat, PK gold loot, dead body visuals, vendor fixes, bank partial withdrawal, and the new auto-updating launcher. Thanks to everyone who helped test!
